implementation_notes: Made three targeted changes: (1) Added ResultMessage to the import block in _invoke_with_role() at line 1681. (2) Replaced the trailing pass in the _invoke_with_role() async for loop with an isinstance(message, ResultMessage) check and break — the loop now exits immediately on ResultMessage instead of waiting for the stream to close. (3) Added break after the logger.info line in the _invoke_task_work_implement() ResultMessage branch at line 3978. Also updated the existing test mock in tests/unit/test_agent_invoker.py::TestSDKIntegration::test_sdk_invocation_calls_query to supply ResultMessage and AssistantMessage as real dynamically-created types (matching how CLINotFoundError etc. are already mocked), and updated the second yielded message to be an instance of MockResultMessage so the isinstance check works and the break fires correctly.
requirements_addressed: _invoke_with_role(): ResultMessage imported and isinstance check with break added
All existing tests pass with no regressions
